CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "HM Central"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "HM West"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "HM East"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "WW"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "CM"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "UC"), ISPICKVAL( Region__c, "PT") ), BLANKVALUE(TEXT(Parent.Region__c),"No ED Region"), TEXT(Region__c) )
CustomField.label: ED Region
